_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: The results revealed a constant XBP1u level in MPNST cells and a decrease in the XBP1s level in S462TY, T265, and ST8814 cells after FT895 treatment
details: Decrease in XBP1s level after FT895 treatment while XBP1u level remained constant
